    U

    ui - package ui
     
    UI() - Constructor for class utilz.Constants.UI
     
    unpauseGame() - Method in class gamestates.Playing
    Unpausing game.
    UP - Static variable in class utilz.Constants.Directions
     
    update() - Method in class components.AnimationComponent
    Updates the health bar, animation state, and attack check.
    update() - Method in class components.Component
    Updates the component's logic every game tick.
    update() - Method in class components.InputComponent
    Updates the entity's animation based on its movement and attack state.
    update() - Method in class components.MovementComponent
    Updates the entity's horizontal position based on movement input.
    update() - Method in class components.PhysicsComponent
    Updates the physics state, applying gravity or triggering a jump.
    update() - Method in class components.RenderComponent
    Updates the render component.
    update() - Method in class entities.Entity
    Updates all components attached to the entity.
    update() - Method in class entities.Player
    Updates the player's state, including health checks and attack box updates.
    update() - Method in class gamestates.Menu
    Updates the state of all the buttons in the menu.
    update() - Method in class gamestates.Playing
    Updates the game state, including player, level, and enemy behaviors.
    update() - Method in interface gamestates.StateMethods
     
    update() - Method in class levels.LevelManager
     
    update() - Method in class main.Game
    Updates the current game state, based on the active game state (MENU, PLAYING, etc.).
    update() - Method in class objects.Coin
     
    update() - Method in class objects.GameContainer
    Updates the container's animation state.
    update() - Method in interface objects.IGameObject
     
    update() - Method in class objects.ObjectManager
    Updates all active game objects (potions, containers, traps).
    update() - Method in class objects.Potion
    Updates the potion's animation state.
    update() - Method in class objects.Trap
     
    update() - Method in class ui.GameOverOverlay
    Updates the state of the buttons (e.g., hover and click effects).
    update() - Method in class ui.LevelCompOverlay
    Updates the state of the buttons (e.g., hover and click effects).
    update() - Method in class ui.MenuButton
    Updates the button's state based on whether the mouse is over the button or it is pressed.
    update() - Method in class ui.PauseOverlay
    Updates the buttons' states (hover, pressed).
    update() - Method in class ui.UrmButton
    Updates the button's state based on mouse interaction (hovered or pressed).
    update(int[][]) - Method in class entities.EnemyManager
    Updates all active enemies.
    update(int[][], Player) - Method in class entities.Orc
    Updates the orc's movement, animation, and attack box.
    updateAnimationTick() - Method in class entities.Enemy
    Updates the animation frame based on animation speed.
    updateAnimationTick() - Method in class objects.GameObject
    Updates the animation tick and progresses the animation if necessary.
    updateHitbox() - Method in class entities.Entity
    Updates entity hitbox.
    updateInAir(int[][]) - Method in class entities.Enemy
    Updates the enemy's vertical position if it is falling.
    updateMove(int[][], Player) - Method in class entities.Orc
    Updates the orc's movement and behavior based on its current state.
    URM_BUTTONS - Static variable in class utilz.LoadSave
     
    URM_DEFAULT_SIZE - Static variable in class utilz.Constants.UI.URMButtons
     
    URM_SIZE - Static variable in class utilz.Constants.UI.URMButtons
     
    UrmButton - Class in ui
    The UrmButton class represents a button with different states (normal, hovered, pressed)
